items.name_en: L⊚℮w℮🌟 🔥 New Version 🆕 New Small Classic Calfskin Puzzle Waist Bag 🌟
items.name_cn:
L⊚℮w℮🌟 🔥 New Version 🆕 New Small Classic Calfskin Puzzle Waist Bag 🌟
*The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create the Puzzle's unique geometric lines. This small waist bag is made of classic calfskin, featuring overlapping edges. Shoulder or crossbody carry *Adjustable shoulder strap with metal buckle closure, engraved with LOEW logo *Zipper closure, calfskin pull tab *External zip pocket and internal slip pocket *One external zip pocket *Herringbone cotton canvas lining *Anagram embossing 🌟
size:24*16*10.5
Model:052344
